flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Morningside University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.3k → $39.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Morningside University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.3k → $39.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Morningside University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Morningside University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (66.5% → 74.2%).
